title: Just A Third Person Camera Mod
description: Brings the third person camera more in line with what other third person games do. Removes second person camera.
body:
# Just A Third Person Camera Mod

Brings the Third Person View more in line with what other third person camera games offer.
This means that you can move the camera pivoted around your player and it will move relative to your camera.
![Camera turning around Steve](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6faf0a9396233d160f93b0fac7e367c2ccf1e67f.gif)

Actions are performed in the direction the player is facing. Not the camera.
![Steve hitting a Zombie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d682b79d4c81bb8a8b258f34b53f40c782283bf.gif)

In the mod settings, you can change the default perspective and how far the camera will move away from you, with a max block distance of 10.
![Showing off the camera mod settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc93a30309da2f182eafc0af3306a3ebd87c9bfe.gif)
